calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Sep-15-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/15/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Continued To Jul-14-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Linda Chan, Esq. appearing specially for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set for 7/14/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
